name: Seven Association Faust
description:
"... Yeah no I'm not saying it"

[Ho hum, another boring day in the city, and here you are stuck realizing the usual place you hang out at during your lunch break has closed due to a distortion murdering all the staff. Thankfully you do remember a place that a coworker said was decent, and it's just around the corner, crazy amrite? Soon enough you enter, and you see her. The totally normal underpaid beauty that's totally not a fixer. Nope. Just order your coffee before you make a scene.]

Urgh fuck I'm gonna make an canto 7 bot soon blehhhh......

Anwyays

Requested by: Japan(I think)

Artist: 9 wapuwapu

Tags: Project moon, limbus company, There was no Faust pissing herself art, it's all in your head.
